# Template

A Template defines a reusable blueprint for creating [Sandboxes](/docs/sandbox). It specifies the container image, resource requirements, pool configuration, lifecycle policies, and other runtime settings.

## What is a Template?

Templates provide:

- **Consistency**: Ensure all sandboxes created from a template have identical configurations
- **Fast startup**: Pre-warmed sandbox pools enable &lt;200ms cold starts
- **Reusability**: Define once, use across your organization
- **Governance**: Control access with team-level visibility settings

<Callout variant="info">
Templates are immutable blueprints. When you update a template, existing sandboxes are not affected—only new sandboxes claimed after the update use the new configuration.
</Callout>

---

## Template Model

### Key Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `template_id` | string | Unique identifier for the template |
| `scope` | string | Visibility scope (`public` or team-scoped) |
| `team_id` | string | Team that owns this template |
| `user_id` | string | User who created this template |
| `spec` | object | Template specification (see [Spec](/docs/template/spec)) |
| `created_at` | timestamp | Creation timestamp |
| `updated_at` | timestamp | Last update timestamp |

### Template Scope

| Scope | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `public` | Visible to all teams in the cluster |
| Team-scoped | Visible only to the owning team and allowed teams |

---

## List Templates

List all templates available to your team.

<Endpoint method="GET">
/api/v1/templates
</Endpoint>

<Tabs
  tabs={[
    {
      label: "Go",
      language: "go",
      code: `client, err := sandbox0.NewClient(
    sandbox0.WithToken(os.Getenv("SANDBOX0_TOKEN")),
)
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}

templates, err := client.ListTemplate(ctx)
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}

for _, tpl := range templates {
    fmt.Printf("- %s (scope: %s)\\n", tpl.TemplateID, tpl.Scope)
}`
    },
    {
      label: "Python",
      language: "python",
      code: `from sandbox0 import Client

client = Client(token=os.environ["SANDBOX0_TOKEN"])

templates = client.list_templates()
for tpl in templates:
    print(f"- {tpl.template_id} (scope: {tpl.scope})")`
    },
    {
      label: "TypeScript",
      language: "typescript",
      code: `import { Client } from 'sandbox0';

const client = new Client({ token: process.env.SANDBOX0_TOKEN! });

const response = await client.apispec.templates.apiV1TemplatesGet();
const templates = response.data?.templates ?? [];
for (const tpl of templates) {
    console.log(\`- \${tpl.templateId} (scope: \${tpl.scope})\`);
}`
    },
    {
      label: "CLI",
      language: "bash",
      code: `s0 template list

# Output:
# default      public    2024-01-10T10:00:00Z
# python-3.11  private   2024-01-12T14:30:00Z
# node-20      private   2024-01-13T09:15:00Z`
    }
  ]}
/>

---

## Create Template

Create a new template with your desired configuration.

<Endpoint method="POST">
/api/v1/templates
</Endpoint>

### Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `template_id` | string | Yes | Unique template identifier |
| `spec` | object | Yes | Template specification |

<Tabs
  tabs={[
    {
      label: "Go",
      language: "go",
      code: `spec := &sandbox0.SandboxTemplateSpec{
    DisplayName: sandbox0.NewOptString("Python 3.11"),
    Description: sandbox0.NewOptString("Python 3.11 runtime environment"),
    MainContainer: &sandbox0.ContainerSpec{
        Image: "python:3.11-slim",
        Resources: &sandbox0.ResourceQuota{
            Cpu:    sandbox0.NewOptString("1"),
            Memory: sandbox0.NewOptString("512Mi"),
        },
    },
    Pool: &sandbox0.PoolStrategy{
        MinIdle:   1,
        MaxIdle:   5,
        AutoScale: true,
    },
    Lifecycle: &sandbox0.LifecyclePolicy{
        DefaultTTL: sandbox0.NewOptInt32(3600),
        MaxTTL:     sandbox0.NewOptInt32(7200),
    },
    Public: sandbox0.NewOptBool(false),
}

template, err := client.CreateTemplate(ctx, "python-3.11", spec)
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}
fmt.Printf("Created template: %s\\n", template.TemplateID)`
    },
    {
      label: "Python",
      language: "python",
      code: `spec = {
    "displayName": "Python 3.11",
    "description": "Python 3.11 runtime environment",
    "mainContainer": {
        "image": "python:3.11-slim",
        "resources": {
            "cpu": "1",
            "memory": "512Mi",
        },
    },
    "pool": {
        "minIdle": 1,
        "maxIdle": 5,
        "autoScale": True,
    },
    "lifecycle": {
        "defaultTTL": 3600,
        "maxTTL": 7200,
    },
    "public": False,
}

template = client.create_template("python-3.11", spec)
print(f"Created template: {template.template_id}")`
    },
    {
      label: "TypeScript",
      language: "typescript",
      code: `const spec = {
    displayName: 'Python 3.11',
    description: 'Python 3.11 runtime environment',
    mainContainer: {
        image: 'python:3.11-slim',
        resources: {
            cpu: '1',
            memory: '512Mi',
        },
    },
    pool: {
        minIdle: 1,
        maxIdle: 5,
        autoScale: true,
    },
    lifecycle: {
        defaultTtl: 3600,
        maxTtl: 7200,
    },
    public: false,
};

const template = await client.createTemplate('python-3.11', spec);
console.log('Created template:', template.templateId);`
    },
    {
      label: "CLI",
      language: "bash",
      code: `s0 template create python-3.11 \\
    --image python:3.11-slim \\
    --cpu 1 --memory 512Mi \\
    --min-idle 1 --max-idle 5 \\
    --default-ttl 3600 --max-ttl 7200

# Output:
# Template created: python-3.11`
    }
  ]}
/>

---

## Get Template

Retrieve details of a specific template.

<Endpoint method="GET">
/api/v1/templates/{'{id}'}
</Endpoint>

<Tabs
  tabs={[
    {
      label: "Go",
      language: "go",
      code: `template, err := client.GetTemplate(ctx, "python-3.11")
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}
fmt.Printf("Template: %s\\n", template.TemplateID)
if name, ok := template.Spec.DisplayName.Get(); ok {
    fmt.Printf("Display Name: %s\\n", name)
}`
    },
    {
      label: "Python",
      language: "python",
      code: `template = client.get_template("python-3.11")
print(f"Template: {template.template_id}")
if template.spec.display_name:
    print(f"Display Name: {template.spec.display_name}")`
    },
    {
      label: "TypeScript",
      language: "typescript",
      code: `const template = await client.getTemplate('python-3.11');
console.log('Template:', template.templateId);
if (template.spec.displayName) {
    console.log('Display Name:', template.spec.displayName);
}`
    },
    {
      label: "CLI",
      language: "bash",
      code: `s0 template get python-3.11

# Output:
# ID: python-3.11
# Display Name: Python 3.11
# Image: python:3.11-slim
# Pool: 1-5 (auto-scale)
# Scope: private`
    }
  ]}
/>

---

## Update Template

Update an existing template's specification.

<Endpoint method="PUT">
/api/v1/templates/{'{id}'}
</Endpoint>

<Callout variant="warning">
Updating a template does not affect existing sandboxes. New sandboxes claimed after the update will use the new configuration.
</Callout>

<Tabs
  tabs={[
    {
      label: "Go",
      language: "go",
      code: `// Get current template
template, err := client.GetTemplate(ctx, "python-3.11")
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}

// Update spec
desc := "Updated description"
template.Spec.Description = &desc
template.Spec.Pool.MaxIdle = 10

// Save changes
updated, err := client.UpdateTemplate(ctx, "python-3.11", template.Spec)
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}
fmt.Printf("Updated template: %s\\n", updated.TemplateID)`
    },
    {
      label: "Python",
      language: "python",
      code: `# Get current template
template = client.get_template("python-3.11")

# Update spec
template.spec.description = "Updated description"
template.spec.pool.max_idle = 10

# Save changes
updated = client.update_template("python-3.11", template.spec)
print(f"Updated template: {updated.template_id}")`
    },
    {
      label: "TypeScript",
      language: "typescript",
      code: `// Get current template
const template = await client.getTemplate('python-3.11');

// Update spec
template.spec.description = 'Updated description';
template.spec.pool.maxIdle = 10;

// Save changes
const updated = await client.updateTemplate('python-3.11', template.spec);
console.log('Updated template:', updated.templateId);`
    },
    {
      label: "CLI",
      language: "bash",
      code: `s0 template update python-3.11 \\
    --description "Updated description" \\
    --max-idle 10

# Output:
# Template updated: python-3.11`
    }
  ]}
/>

---

## Delete Template

Delete a template. Sandboxes created from this template will continue to run.

<Endpoint method="DELETE">
/api/v1/templates/{'{id}'}
</Endpoint>

<Callout variant="danger">
Deleting a template is irreversible. You cannot create new sandboxes from a deleted template.
</Callout>

<Tabs
  tabs={[
    {
      label: "Go",
      language: "go",
      code: `_, err := client.DeleteTemplate(ctx, "python-3.11")
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}
fmt.Println("Template deleted")`
    },
    {
      label: "Python",
      language: "python",
      code: `client.delete_template("python-3.11")
print("Template deleted")`
    },
    {
      label: "TypeScript",
      language: "typescript",
      code: `await client.deleteTemplate('python-3.11');
console.log('Template deleted');`
    },
    {
      label: "CLI",
      language: "bash",
      code: `s0 template delete python-3.11

# Output:
# Template deleted: python-3.11`
    }
  ]}
/>

---
